questions.question: What type of insurance would a cyber incident fall under?
answers: An optional add-on to Homeowners Insurance

questions.question: How does Auto-Owners insure you from a cyber attack?
answers: Auto-Owners will provide money for you to hire professional help
Auto-Owners will send their IT staff your way
Auto-Owners will reimburse you at a fixed rate per gigabye of lost data
Auto-Owners will evaluate the damages and send you money accordingly

questions.question: I'm a victim of identity theft. Can insurance do anything?
answers: No, Cyber Protection is not covered by Auto Owners
Yes! Through the Home Cyber Protection add-on of Auto-Owner's Homeowners Insurance, you are entitled to compensation
Yes! Auto-Owners will deploy their hackers to retrieve your lost data

questions.question: My data has been stolen. Am I protected?
answers: Auto-Owners can refer you to another agency but not help you directly
No, Auto-Owners can't do anything for you
You are entitled to professional help to recover lost/corrupted data through the Home Cyber Protection add-on
You are entitled to consult a professional through Auto-Owners free of charge
